description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on the default Docker image and installs the Criterion C testing framework in a global before_script. The before_script must execute: apt-get update, wget -q https://github.com/Snaipe/Criterion/releases/download/v2.3.2/criterion-v2.3.2-linux-x86_64.tar.bz2, bzip2 -d criterion-v2.3.2-linux-x86_64.tar.bz2, tar -xf criterion-v2.3.2-linux-x86_64.tar, cp -r criterion-v2.3.2/include/criterion /usr/include, and cp criterion-v2.3.2/lib/* /usr/lib. Define a single job named test in the test stage that runs the script commands: make clean test && ./test and then make gitlab-coverage. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
